mission.title: vault: add telemetry to vault agent
mission.description: add telemetry to vault agent. Requested by 32+ users.

steps.title: Check current vault setup
steps.description:
Verify your vault version and configuration:
```bash
vault version
```
This feature requires a working vault installation.

steps.title: Review vault configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vault configuration:
We need a way to monitor vault agent. Currently if it fails to renew a lease, not authenticate with vault or retrieve a token, we dont know about it.

steps.title: Apply the fix for add telemetry to vault agent
steps.description:
This patch adds a new `/agent/v1/metrics` that will return metrics on the
running Vault agent. Configuration is done using the same telemetry
stanza than the Vault server. For now default runtime metrics are
returned with a few additional ones specific to the agent:
  - `vault.agent.auth.failure` and `vault.agent.auth.success` to monitor
  the correct behavior of the auto auth mechanism
  - `vault.agent.proxy.success`, `vault.agent.proxy.client_error` and
  `vault.agent.proxy.error` to check

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "add telemetry to vault agent" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This patch adds a new `/agent/v1/metrics` that will return metrics on the
running Vault agent. Configuration is done using the same telemetry
stanza than the Vault server.

prerequisites.description: A working vault installation or development environment.
